{{Video|linked_video=[[Reacting to the Meaning Crisis]]|link=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9ZRDnx49np4|topic=[[Lifeism]], [[Epistemology]], [[Metaphysics]], [[Fermi Paradox]]|linking_videos=[[Meta-Crisis]], [[Is it okay to be thirsty?]]}}It is for a contest, [[Immanuelle]] discovered it through a video on Hermetic theories<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2aq820K-7r8<nowiki/>(note that this is citing a comment on the video not the video itself)</ref>

Here is the link https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9ZRDnx49np4

The page history is pretty crucial for understanding the sources. The [[Great November Outage]] is resolved now, and this edit made the page go back to its original form. It still is not perfect. This was the intended end point of the [[video path]] but it is not anymore. 



Not the best video in terms of covering things. But one of the most viewed ones right now.

== Video description ==
In this video, I'm going to be exploring the systems-oriented theory of everything. This theory suggests that everything is interconnected and that we can only understand the world by looking at it from a systems perspective. I'll be discussing the consciousness, religion, and aliens hypotheses, and how they are all related to the systems-oriented theory of everything. I hope you enjoy this video, and please leave a comment if you have any questions! #pace22 

join my discord server <nowiki>https://discord.gg/swv7gz7ZEK</nowiki> read my website <nowiki>https://evolution.faith</nowiki> Here is the wiki article I wrote to accompany the video [[A Systems-Oriented Theory of Everything]]

== Script ==

=== Introduction ===

=== Against Cogito Ergo Sum ===

=== Phenomenal knowing ===

=== Value theory ===

=== Procedural knowing ===

=== Propositional knowing ===

=== Three types of knowledge ===
[[File:Tripartite Knowing.svg|thumb|knowledge]]
=== Alo ===
{{Main|Alo}}

=== Psychology introduction ===

=== Neurology ===

=== Levels of consciousness ===

=== Increasing consciousness ===

=== Religion ===

=== Alo and small worldedness ===

=== Intelligence and self sabotage ===

=== Atheism ===

=== Is atheism universal across alien civilizations ===

=== Secularization and the Fermi paradox ===

== Segue ==
Into [[Reacting to the Meaning Crisis]] as the source of my beliefs

== References ==
[[Category:Immanuelle's Youtube Channel]]
[[Category:Videos]]
[[sn:A Systems-Oriented Theory of Everything]][[sn:A Systems-Oriented Theory of Everything]]<references />
__NOINDEX__[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
